title: Gregaria
description: The innovative modpack that seamlessly blends creativity and exploring, delivering a vibrant and engaging Minecraft experience.
body:
###  Gregaria.

Gregaria is a distinctive Minecraft modpack that artfully combines the finest elements of Terramity, GregTech, and Create, designed to provide you with a truly immersive experience while prioritizing visual aesthetics. You'll encounter charming residents called Ribbits, alongside exciting multiplayer interactions that enhance your adventure.

The pack also features custom quests and innovative crafting options woven throughout the gameplay, Gregaria is set to enrich your gaming experience dramatically.

### Features:

- 🔥 Comfort - Stay warm and cozy amid diverse climates and environments.
- 🌼 Challenging Crafting - Embrace the intricate, hard-hitting Greggy playstyle!
- 🧩 Custom Quests - Immerse yourself in thrilling quests that enhance your gameplay.
- 🏰 Multiplayer Interactions - Collaborate and explore with friends!
- ⚒️ Skill Development - Earn experience to refine and boost your character’s skills.
- 🎒 Advanced Storage Solutions - backpacks and custom storage options using(AE2)

### Inspirations:

This modpack draws inspiration from several remarkable sources that have shaped its design and gameplay:
- **GregTech Community Pack Modern**: Known for its intricate systems and challenging mechanics, this modpack emphasizes depth and complexity, encouraging players to explore advanced technology.
- **Sensible MC**: Celebrated for its balanced approach and intuitive mechanics, Sensible MC integrates quality-of-life improvements while maintaining the core essence of Minecraft.

These inspirations collectively contribute to the engaging and immersive experience that Gregaria aims to provide.

### Miscellaneous:

Shader support hasn’t been tested with this pack.
